title: Two Sum Optimization
description: Optimize a naive O(N^2) Two Sum solution into O(N) using a Hash Map.

title: SQL Revenue Window Analysis
description: Write a PostgreSQL query using window functions to calculate a 7-day rolling average of daily revenue.

title: Build a Simple REST API
description: Given a boilerplate, implement a GET endpoint that returns a paginated list of users.

title: React State Debugging
description: Fix a React component where a generic `useState` hook lacks proper TypeScript typing, leading to a build error.

title: Dockerize a Node App
description: A given Dockerfile fails to expose port 8080. Identify and fix the Dockerfile so the container can start properly.

title: Kubernetes Ingress YAML Fix
description: The provided K8s Ingress YAML routes to the wrong backend service. Fix the `backend.service.name` to restore routing.

title: Pandas Data Cleaning
description: Given a CSV, write a Pandas script to drop rows with NaN in the 'Price' column and normalize the 'Name' column to lowercase.

title: Scikit-Learn Classification
description: Train a Random Forest classifier on the Iris dataset and return predictions. Fill in the missing `.fit()` and `.predict()` calls.

title: OWASP Top 10 Identification
description: Identify the primary vulnerability in a snippet of raw SQL concatenated with user input.
explanations: XSS involves executing scripts in a user's browser, not database execution.
Correct. Concatenating user input directly into a SQL query string allows SQL Injection.
IDOR involves accessing objects bypassing authorization, not manipulating the query structure.
CSRF forces an end user to execute unwanted actions, unrelated to this DB query pattern.

title: Linux Permissions Parsing
description: Translate the numeric file permission `chmod 644` into its symbolic representation for `user`, `group`, and `others`.
explanations: Correct. 6 = read+write (rw) for owner, 4 = read (r) for group, 4 = read (r) for others.

title: Incident Response Log Triage
description: Review the following web server log snippet. A sudden spike in 401 Unauthorized errors from a single IP is observed. Choose the most appropriate initial containment response.
rubric: Identifies the attack as a likely brute-force attempt.
Suggests temporarily blocking the offending IP address via WAF or firewall.

title: AWS IAM Least Privilege
description: Which of the following JSON policies grants read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'company-logs'?
explanations: This grants full control over the bucket.
Correct. Explicitly limiting to GetObject applies least privilege for reading objects.
This only allows listing buckets natively, not reading the objects.
This provides admin rights over objects in the bucket.
